name: Orie
bio: I'm Orie, and I've been writing stories for as long as I can remember. It started with scribbled adventures in composition notebooks — tales about brave kids, magical animals, and worlds just a little different from ours. Somewhere along the way, the scribbles turned into chapters, and the chapters turned into actual books.

When I'm not writing, you can find me reading (obviously), exploring new places, or trying to convince my family that we need more bookshelves. I'm inspired by authors who make you feel something real — who build worlds you don't want to leave and characters who feel like friends.

I write because I believe stories have the power to make us braver, kinder, and more curious. And I think young voices have just as much to say as anyone else. Thanks for being here — I'm really glad you found your way to my little corner of the book world.

funFacts.text: Favorite book: too many to pick just one (but okay, maybe Bridge to Terabithia)
Writing fuel: hot chocolate and lo-fi music
Dream: to write a book that ends up on someone's "changed my life" list
Fun fact: I name all my characters before I know what they look like

shortBio: Hi! I'm Orie — a young writer who's been making up stories since before I could spell them all correctly. I believe every person has a story worth telling, and I'm just getting started with mine. Welcome to my little corner of the book world.
